name: Hidden Treasures
recipeIngredient: 48 Maraschino Cherries, drained on paper towels
1 Cup White Melting Chocolate, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 60 Minutes Bake Time: 10 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Add this dry mixture to the creamed mixture in low-speed intervals.
4. Spread the dough very thinly around the drained cherries on an ungreased baking sheet, placing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Allow to cool for one minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a cooling rack to cool completely.
6. To make dipping chocolate: Melt the chosen chocolate and Butter Flavor Crisco in a microwave using low heat or power setting. Stir until smooth.
7. Place the melted chocolate in a glass measuring cup. Dip each cookie one at a time into the chocolate, turning them gently. Allow excess chocolate to drip off before placing on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the white chocolate-coated cookies and slivered white chocolate over the dark chocolate-coated cookies while the chocolate is still wet. Refrigerate until set.
Makes 4 dozen cookies
If the chocolate becomes too firm, reheat it gently to restore its consistency.
